title: KD Overlay
description: This mod is an overlay that shows your loka kd! It uses EldritchBot to show your kd while also having a search feature!
body:
This mod allows for YOU to see your eldritchbot kd in game! It also has a toggle on/off feature and a search player option where you can see a players entire stats!

All info taken from EldritchBot.com/LokaMC API

Check out eldritchbot!
